auth.label: API Key
auth.description: EasyPost API key used as the Basic authentication username. Create or manage keys in EasyPost account settings: https://app.easypost.com/account/settings?tab=api-keys

actions.name: create_address
actions.description: Create an immutable EasyPost address for shipping workflows.

street1.description: The first line of the address.

street2.description: The second line of the address.

name.description: The person name for the address.

company.description: The organization name for the address.

phone.description: The phone number for the person or organization.

email.description: The email address for the person or organization.

residential.description: Whether the address should be treated as residential.

carrier_facility.description: The carrier facility designation when relevant.

federal_tax_id.description: The federal tax identifier for the person or organization.

state_tax_id.description: The state tax identifier for the person or organization.

verify.description: Set true to request EasyPost delivery and ZIP verification.

verify_strict.description: Set true to request strict EasyPost delivery and ZIP verification.

verify_carrier.description: The carrier-specific address verification service to use.

inputSchema.description: The EasyPost address fields to create.

address.description: A JSON object returned by EasyPost.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after creating an EasyPost address.

actions.name: create_tracker
actions.description: Create an EasyPost standalone tracker from a carrier tracking code.

tracking_code.description: The tracking code associated with the package.

carrier.description: The carrier associated with the tracking code.

inputSchema.description: The EasyPost standalone tracker fields to create.

tracker.description: A JSON object returned by EasyPost.

outputSchema.description: The response returned after creating an EasyPost tracker.

actions.name: get_address
actions.description: Retrieve an EasyPost address by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving an EasyPost address.

address.description: A JSON object returned by EasyPost.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving an EasyPost address.

actions.name: get_tracker
actions.description: Retrieve an EasyPost tracker by ID.

inputSchema.description: The input for retrieving an EasyPost tracker.

tracker.description: A JSON object returned by EasyPost.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when retrieving an EasyPost tracker.

actions.name: list_carrier_types
actions.description: List carrier types available to the EasyPost account.

inputSchema.description: The input for listing EasyPost carrier types.

items.description: A JSON object returned by EasyPost.

carrierTypes.description: The EasyPost carrier types available to the account.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing EasyPost carrier types.

actions.name: list_trackers
actions.description: List EasyPost trackers with pagination and optional carrier filters.

page_size.description: The number of records to return on each page.

start_datetime.description: Only return trackers created after this timestamp.

end_datetime.description: Only return trackers created before this timestamp.

tracking_codes.description: Only return trackers with these tracking codes.

carrier.description: Only return trackers with this carrier.

inputSchema.description: The filters and pagination parameters for listing EasyPost trackers.

items.description: A JSON object returned by EasyPost.

trackers.description: The EasyPost trackers returned for the page.

hasMore.description: Whether another page of trackers is available.

raw.description: A JSON object returned by EasyPost.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing EasyPost trackers.
